UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES, AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION  TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL PILE DRIVERS, DIVERS, CARPENTERS, BRIDGE WHARF AND DOCK BUILDERS, LOCAL UNION 34 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT HATCHETT MOUNTAIN CONSTRUCTION, INC. $18,129.90 PRINCIPAL, $18,134.88 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,309.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; INDEX OF AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES, AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA SERVED JUN-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT HATCHETT MOUNTAIN CONSTRUCTION, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL, AND PILE DRIVERS, DIVERS, CARPENTERS, BRIDGE WHARF AND DOCK BUILDERS, LOCAL UNION 34'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-11-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Index Of Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL, AND PILE DRIVERS, DIVERS, CARPENTERS, BRIDGE WHARF AND DOCK BUILDERS, LOCAL UNION 34'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
